sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ أَخِي أَثْنَاءَ اللَّعِبِ بِكُرَةِ الْقَدَمِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Moj brat je pao dok se igrao fudbala u bašti.
sentences.translationEn: My brother fell while playing football in the garden.

sentences.arabic: نَظَّفْتُ الْجُرْحَ الصَّغِيرَ بِالْمَاءِ وَالصَّابُونِ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pažljivo sam očistio malu ranu vodom i sapunom.
sentences.translationEn: I cleaned the small wound with water and soap carefully.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، وَضَعْتُ ضِمَادَةً طِبِّيَّةً نَظِيفَةً عَلَى الْجُرْحِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga, stavio sam čist medicinski zavoj na ranu.
sentences.translationEn: After that, I put a clean medical bandage on the wound.
